info.title: Wash N Press API
info.description:
Wash N Press laundry platform REST API.

**Authentication:** Session cookie `wnp_session` set after `POST /api/auth/otp/verify` or `POST /api/operations/auth/login`.

**Dev demo phones:** Resident `9876543210`, Operator `9876500002`, Admin `9876500001`

get.summary: Check if phone is new or returning

post.summary: Notify me when society is available

get.summary: Active subscription with usage and billing

sessionCookie.name: wnp_session
sessionCookie.description: Session cookie set after OTP verify or operator login
